form.formComment: At the latest run sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Dubbo Cl1 on March 15 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Feared carrying 59.5kg at $4.20. The run before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Dubbo Cl1 on March 6 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Bolo Miss carrying 59kg at $14. Going well. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 12 at Narromine Cl1 December 2 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Romantic Love with 53.5kg at $26. At his first start won by 0.5 len Muswellbrook Mdn October 20 over 900m defeating Won'thearmecoming carrying 56.5kg at $16. Slim contender with the claim.

Strong chance to break through from the good gate.
